Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello world","helloworld","hello-world","HELLO","hi.world","world hello","a hello b" ] | where s has "hello" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('hello world'), ('helloworld'), ('hello-world'), ('HELLO'), ('hi.world'), ('world hello'), ('a hello b')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%hello%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello world","helloworld","hello-world","HELLO","hi.world" ] | where s has_cs "hello" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('hello world'), ('helloworld'), ('hello-world'), ('HELLO'), ('hi.world')) AS t(s) WHERE s LIKE '%hello%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello world","helloworld","hello-world","HELLO" ] | where s !has "hello" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('hello world'), ('helloworld'), ('hello-world'), ('HELLO')) AS t(s) WHERE s NOT ILIKE '%hello%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "foo.bar.baz","foo bar","foobar","BAR","x.bar.y" ] | where s has "bar" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('foo.bar.baz'), ('foo bar'), ('foobar'), ('BAR'), ('x.bar.y')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%bar%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "alpha-beta","alpha_beta","alpha beta","alphabeta" ] | where s has "alpha" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('alpha-beta'), ('alpha_beta'), ('alpha beta'), ('alphabeta')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%alpha%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "The quick brown","quickbrown","brown quick" ] | where s contains "quick" | project s, has_q = s has "quick"
Sql: SELECT s, s ILIKE '%quick%' AS has_q FROM (VALUES ('The quick brown'), ('quickbrown'), ('brown quick')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%quick%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "café","cafe","CAFÉ","Café","café" ] | where s =~ "café" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('café'), ('cafe'), ('CAFÉ'), ('Café'), ('café')) AS t(s) WHERE UPPER(s) = UPPER('café')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "café","cafe","CAFÉ","Café" ] | where s == "café" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('café'), ('cafe'), ('CAFÉ'), ('Café')) AS t(s) WHERE s = 'café'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Straße","strasse","STRASSE","straße" ] | where s =~ "straße" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('Straße'), ('strasse'), ('STRASSE'), ('straße')) AS t(s) WHERE UPPER(s) = UPPER('straße')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "emoji😀here","emojihere","😀","abc😀def" ] | where s contains "😀" | project s, len=strlen(s)
Sql: SELECT s, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS len FROM (VALUES ('emoji😀here'), ('emojihere'), ('😀'), ('abc😀def')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%😀%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "naïve","naive","NAÏVE" ] | where s has "naïve" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('naïve'), ('naive'), ('NAÏVE')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%naïve%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Hello","HELLO","hello","hELLO" ] | where s in~ ("hello","world") | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('Hello'), ('HELLO'), ('hello'), ('hELLO')) AS t(s) WHERE UPPER(s) IN ('HELLO', 'WORLD')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Hello","HELLO","hello" ] | where s in ("hello","world") | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('Hello'), ('HELLO'), ('hello')) AS t(s) WHERE s IN ('hello', 'world')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a1b2c3","abc","123","a1","9z9" ] | where s matches regex @"[a-z][0-9]" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('a1b2c3'), ('abc'), ('123'), ('a1'), ('9z9')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"[a-z][0-9]')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "2020-01-15","not a date","1999-12-31","abc-de-fg" ] | where s matches regex @"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('2020-01-15'), ('not a date'), ('1999-12-31'), ('abc-de-fg')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$')

Sql: SELECT s, CONCAT(s, '!') AS q FROM (VALUES ('O''Brien'), ('D''Angelo'), ('normal'), ('it''s')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%%'
